releaseSummary: Statements show only real posted Innovations records, including aging buckets, statement totals, and itemized financial activity.
My Orders adds a live Rx-only status table with order, invoice, patient, and current-status dates; existing delivery tracking remains available.

moduleImpact.notes: Updated as part of Portal Statements and Rx Status.

migrationNotes: No manual data migration is required for this release.
